data.name: Cards of Lust
data.detailed_description:
Cards of Lust is a strip tease card combat game.

Like any card game, luck plays a big role in each turn's outcome, but thanks to its innovative strategy selector, Cards of Lust lets you influence which cards are dealt to you, so you have the chance to react accordingly. For example, you can hint the dealer for healing cards if you're running low on health, and there's a better chance you'll get one.

Features:
  • Straightforward and addicting gameplay
  • 3 gorgeous girls to play against
  • 5 progression levels per girl
  • FullHD animations at 60fps
  • Deck of 40 cards
  • Strategy selector lets you influence your luck with the dealer
  • Small install size and low system requirements

data.short_description: Cards of Lust is a card battler where you play against beautiful women, get them to strip as you win matches and unlock hardcore animated scenes as a reward for victory!

pc_requirements.minimum:
最低配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統
  • 作業系統 *: Windows 7 SP1+
  • 處理器: Dual Core 2 GHz
  • 記憶體: 4 GB 記憶體
  • 顯示卡: Intel HD 4600 (AMD or NVIDIA equivalent)
  • DirectX: 版本：11
  • 儲存空間: 600 MB 可用空間
pc_requirements.recommended:
建議配備:
  • 需要 64 位元的處理器及作業系統

pc_requirements.minimum:
Minimum:
  • Requires a 64-bit processor and operating system
  • OS *: Windows 7 SP1+
  • Processor: Dual Core 2 GHz
  • Memory: 4 GB RAM
  • Graphics: Intel HD 4600 (AMD or NVIDIA equivalent)
